results.title: ChatGPT-Maker OpenAI Is Headed for a $1 Trillion IPO. The Biggest Winner Could Be Microsoft Stock.
results.description: The worst-performing "Magnificent Seven" stock of 2026 owns about a quarter of one of the biggest IPOs in the pipeline.

results.title: 100 authors demand $75M from Anthropic over ‘stolen’ work to train its systems: lawsuit
results.description: Over 100 fed-up authors are demanding over $75 million from a San Francisco-based AI company Anthropic that allegedly stole their books to train its systems.

results.title: The greyhound races Tasmanian authorities don't want you to see
results.description: If you watched greyhound race videos on Tasracing's website, you would likely never know that dozens of dogs were injured or killed during events last year.
